category_sources: source_facts.description says String tool; official freedesktop.org page describes intltool as tools for centralizing translation using GNU gettext-compatible PO files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is intltool; official freedesktop.org and Launchpad project pages use intltool.
docs_sources: Official freedesktop.org intltool page is the primary project documentation and describes usage, downloads, discussion, and bugs.
repo_sources: Official Launchpad project page for intltool lists Code and the development focus branch lp:intltool using Bazaar.
tags_sources: Official freedesktop.org page says intltool extracts and merges translatable strings for XML, desktop, glade, and gettext-compatible PO workflows.
